title: stemmacantha heleniifolia
intro: Stemmacantha heleniifolia, also known as the cotton thistle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues, and it has been used to treat various ailments including rheumatism and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Stemmacantha heleniifolia include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be made by drying the plant's leaves and flowers, and then using them in teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
